title: requests — tenancy hooks
description: Per-tenant lifecycle callbacks (`#[AsTenancyHook]`) this module contributes. None today — the module holds no per-tenant runtime state that needs warming or clearing beyond what workflow/approvals + access/grants already do. This file exists for uniform blueprint shape; hooks land here if a future feature needs per-tenant preloading (e.g. warming the AccessRequestableRegistry-per-tenant map when a tenant has resource-type overrides).
notes: The AccessRequestableRegistry is APPLICATION-WIDE (not per-tenant) — it's populated at boot from the classmap discovery. Every tenant sees the same requestable resource types.

If per-tenant resource-type overrides ever ship (e.g. tenant A can request `invoice.export` but tenant B cannot), those overrides go on the `workflow/approvals` template layer via `when_expression` evaluation, NOT on the registry. Registry stays uniform + fast.
